required_behavior: Dispatch Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet id 0x13 to the existing WindowProperty decoder so the official ClientboundContainerSetDataPacket fixture body 070002012c decodes as container id 7, data id 2, value 300, and consumes the full body.
forbidden: Do not edit oracle answers or expected bytes.
Do not read official jars or decompiled official sources while applying the Rust fix.
Do not broaden the change beyond the allowed_write_scope.
Do not implement menu property semantics, inventory state, or initialized game-state behavior.
stop_boundary: This fix is only for Play clientbound minecraft:container_set_data / 0x13 packet dispatch/decode for one official numeric fixture. It does not prove menu property semantics, inventory state, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
